_comment: Copy this file to profiles.json and edit it. Each profile = one isolated Chrome profile (its own cookies/session). userDataDir = an ABSOLUTE path, unique per identity. ntfyUrl (optional) = your own NTFY topic for alerts, e.g. https://ntfy.sh/your-topic (leave empty to disable; PW_MCP_NTFY_URL env overrides too). Nothing is hardcoded — the proxy only invokes the official @playwright/mcp with documented flags (--user-data-dir, --caps).
